name: Led Drawing Board with 13 Light Effects, 16" Rechargeable Glow Doodle LED Note Board with Colors, Neon Light Up Drawing Tablet Gifts for Kids for Easter Birthday Christmas Gift Ideas
bullets: 8 Vibrant RGB Colors And 6 Dynamic Modes Bring Creativity to Life: Unlock endless possibilities with light and shadow! This LED magic board features 8 vivid RGB colors and 6 dazzling dynamic modes. Kids can effortlessly switch modes, transforming every drawing into a vibrant visual adventure. More than just a drawing board, it's an interactive light playground that sparks imagination, bringing static artwork to life with energy and fun

Rechargeable Design & Portable Stand for Play Anywhere: Say goodbye to cable clutter and embrace wireless creativity! This lumi board led drawing tablet features a built-in rechargeable battery, delivering up to 8 hours of use at maximum brightness or 16 hours at minimum brightness. The integrated portable stand lets you place it effortlessly on desks, bedside tables, or floors—perfect for family messages, kids' creations, or decorative accents, lighting up inspiration anytime, anywhere

Play While Learning, Cultivating Expression and Focus: This led note board is designed for creative growth! Featuring a spacious 13.7 x 11-inch ultra-hard acrylic panel, it encourages children to tell stories and keep journals using the light up drawing board, honing logical thinking and imagination. The unique brightness adjustment function not only controls light intensity but also effectively filters harsh glare, ensuring every drawing session is safe and comfortable

Premium Complete Accessories for an Instant Experience: We've thought of everything! The set includes a LED drawing board with stand, USB-C cable, 7 colored markers, tracing paper, magnets, lanyard, spray bottle, and cleaning cloth. From creation to display, cleaning to storage, all accessories are included to ensure you can effortlessly embark on your creative journey right out of the box

The Perfect Creative Gift to Brighten Every Festive Occasion: This is the ideal gift that delivers delightful surprises! This led writing board blends fun and artistry, offering children hours of pure, screen-free enjoyment. Whether for birthdays, Valentines Day, Children's Day, Halloween, Christmas, or everyday celebrations, this practical lumi board makes a sought-after, unforgettable, and uniquely special gift
